'''âz-j-r-p''' ('''kazajrepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excerpt|excerpt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excerpt|excerpt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-j-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazajrepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizajrepoko|thizajrepoko]] || [[word:jizajrepoko|jizajrepoko]] || [[word:shizajrepoko|shizajrepoko]] || [[word:kizajrepoko|kizajrepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
